all.en: My hiking group decided to climb a small mountain to watch the sunrise.
all.zh: 我的登山團決定爬一座小山，去看日出。

all.en: We started at three in the morning, wearing headlamps and warm jackets.
all.zh: 我們在凌晨三點出發，戴著頭燈，穿著保暖外套。

all.en: The trail was steep, slippery, and much darker than I had expected.
all.zh: 步道又陡又滑，而且比我預想的還要黑得多。

all.en: Every few minutes, somebody slipped, but we always helped each other up.
all.zh: 每隔幾分鐘就有人滑倒，但我們總是互相扶持站起來。

all.en: After two long hours of climbing, we finally reached the summit safely.
all.zh: 在漫長地爬了兩個小時後，我們終於安全抵達山頂。

all.en: The sky was still navy blue, but a hint of orange touched the horizon.
all.zh: 天空仍是深藍色，但地平線上已透出一絲橘色。

all.en: We sat down on cold rocks and drank hot tea from our thermoses.
all.zh: 我們坐在冰冷的岩石上，從保溫瓶裡倒出熱茶喝。

all.en: Slowly, the sun rose, painting the clouds in pink, gold, and lavender.
all.zh: 太陽緩緩升起，把雲彩染上粉紅、金黃和淡紫色。

all.en: For a few minutes, nobody in our group said a single word.
all.zh: 有那麼幾分鐘，團裡沒有任何人說一句話。

all.en: It was as if nature was speaking and we were simply listening.
all.zh: 彷彿大自然在說話，而我們只是靜靜聆聽。

all.en: On the way down, I realized that some mornings are absolutely worth losing sleep for.
all.zh: 下山途中，我體會到有些清晨真的值得讓我們犧牲睡眠。

all.en: On the way down, the trail looked completely different in the bright morning light.
all.zh: 下山途中，步道在明亮的晨光中看起來與來時截然不同。

all.en: We could finally see the wildflowers and small streams we had missed earlier.
all.zh: 我們終於看見了先前錯過的野花和小溪。

all.en: Our group leader pointed out several rare bird species along the lower path.
all.zh: 領隊在下方的步道上，指出了好幾種罕見的鳥類。

all.en: My legs felt tired but my heart felt lighter than it had in months.
all.zh: 雙腿雖然疲憊，但我的心卻比過去幾個月都還要輕盈。

all.en: We stopped at a small mountain restaurant for hot soup and steamed buns.
all.zh: 我們在一間小山產餐廳停下來，吃了熱湯和包子。

all.en: The owner asked about the sunrise and proudly recommended his favorite spots.
all.zh: 老闆問起日出的景色，並驕傲地推薦了他最喜歡的景點。

all.en: Back at the car park, we exchanged contact information and weekend plans.
all.zh: 回到停車場後，我們互相留了聯絡方式，分享週末的計畫。

all.en: Two members suggested another sunrise hike for the following month's full moon.
all.zh: 有兩位團員提議下個月滿月時，再進行一次日出登山。

all.en: I agreed instantly, already excited for another quiet morning above the clouds.
all.zh: 我馬上就答應了，已經迫不及待再次擁有雲海上方的寧靜清晨。

all.en: Some experiences, I learned, are worth every aching muscle the next day.
all.zh: 我體會到，有些經歷值得隔天身上每一塊痠痛的肌肉。
